with:
  # Combine all clauses into a single sentence
      if clauses:
          sentence = ", ".join(clauses) + "."
          # Capitalise first character
          return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
      # Fallback: if no clauses were generated (e.g., parsing issues), create a simple sentence
      fallback_parts = []
      for t in triples:
          if isinstance(t, Triple):
              s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
          elif isinstance(t, dict):
              s = t.get("subject") or t.get("subject_") or ""
              p = t.get("predicate") or t.get("predicate_") or ""
              o = t.get("object") or t.get("object_") or ""
          elif isinstance(t, (list, tuple)) and len(t) == 3:
              s, p, o = t
          elif isinstance(t, str):
              parts = [x.strip() for x in t.split("|")]
              if len(parts) != 3:
                  continue
              s, p, o = parts
          else:
              continue
          o = _clean(str(o))
          fallback_parts.append(f"{s} {p} {o}")
      if fallback_parts:
          fallback_sentence = ". ".join(fallback_parts).strip() + "."
          return fallback_sentence[0].upper() + fallback_sentence[1:]
      return ""
